title: Judge Temporarily Pauses Paramount's Acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery
summary: As Variety reports , Judge Araceli Martinez-Olguin with the US District Court for the Northern District of California heard arguments on Friday and granted a 14-day restraining order blocking Paramount and WBD from closing the deal.
caption: output/2026-07-21/judge-temporarily-pauses-paramount-s-acquisition-of-warner-bros-discov.txt
